Off Calendar Sep-03-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Eric C. Kastner, Atty. for Petitioner and moving party: John Quinn
Emmett C. Stanton, Atty. for Defendant and opposing party: Aechelon Technology, Inc.

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED with modifications: Petitioner John Quinn's Motion For Writ Of Mandate To Compel Inspection Of Corporate Records And Interview With Sayre Stevick is granted in part and denied in part. The motion is granted as it seeks to inspect the books, records, and documents enumerated in Petitioner's requests. The motion is denied as it seeks an interview with Sayre Stevick as interviews do not fall within the purview of Corporations Code Section 1602. The court does not find a basis for imposing restrictions on Petitioner's access to documents or for a trial of the matter. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
